core_mechanism: coevolutionary (adaptive-network) dynamics: a bidirectional feedback loop in which node states evolve toward those of their neighbours while links are simultaneously rewired according to state similarity, driving a fragmentation transition between a single connected consensus cluster and multiple disconnected polarized clusters
brief_reason: The abstract centers on the interplay and feedback between a dynamical process on the nodes and the network topology, with similarity-based adaptive rewiring that both fosters and divides clusters and controls transitions between consensus and polarized states.
